title: Escaped characters count double in INSERT
key_bug_features: Escaped characters count double in INSERT statement
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE test2 (id INT, description TEXT DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO test2 (id, description) VALUES (1, '\\''), (2, NULL);
SELECT char_length(description) FROM test2 WHERE id = 1;
